title: 2013 Census data user guide | Stats NZ
content:
## 2013 Census data user guide
03 December 2013, 10:45am
The 2013 Census data user guide is an easy-to-use reference for people using data from the 2013 Census of Population and Dwellings. It answers some of the common questions you may have about census data. The questions relate to the collection and processing of census data, as well as its interpretation and use.
- 2013 Census data user guide Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 522 KB

### 2013 Census data user guide
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 522 KB
ISBN 978-0-478-40865-2 (online)

- 2018 Census 29 April 2019
